subject: [PATCH nfs-utils v2 15/16] exportfs: use netlink to probe kernel support, skip export_test

2026-03-30.patch_summary: This patch refactors the `can_test` function in the exportfs utility to first try resolving the sunrpc genl family via netlink. If successful, it skips the advisory export test probe and instead relies on mountd and exportd to validate exports at cache-fill time. The patch also updates the `validate_export` function to check for this return value and skip the export test calls when netlink is available. Additionally, it links exportfs against libnl3/libnl-genl-3 and includes necessary headers for netlink support.
